message:
Initialize workspace infrastructure for FrankenSQLite

Set up the foundational build system for a 23-crate Rust workspace that
will house a clean-room reimplementation of SQLite with MVCC page-level
versioning.

Workspace Cargo.toml:
- Defines all 23 workspace members under crates/ with resolver = "2"
- Excludes fuzz/ from workspace compilation
- Configures workspace-wide dependencies: thiserror 2.0, serde 1.0,
  tracing 0.1, bitflags 2.9, smallvec 1.13, memchr 2.7, parking_lot 0.12,
  sha2 0.10, and dev-deps criterion 0.5, proptest 1.6, insta 1.42, tempfile 3.17
- Enforces #[forbid(unsafe_code)] globally via workspace lints
- Enables clippy pedantic + nursery at deny level with targeted allows
  for cast_precision_loss, doc_markdown, missing_const_for_fn, etc.
- Release profile: opt-level "z", LTO, single codegen unit, abort on panic,
  stripped symbols (optimized for minimal binary size)
- Dev profile: opt-level 1 for faster iteration

rust-toolchain.toml:
- Pins to nightly channel (required for edition 2024 features)
- Default host only, no extra components or targets

.gitignore:
- Excludes Rust build artifacts (target/), editor/IDE files, OS detritus,
  profiling/coverage data, fuzz corpus, and AI agent ephemeral state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+# Rust / Cargo build artifacts
+/target/
+**/target/
+
+# Cargo lock is committed (workspace contains binary crate fsqlite-cli)
+# Cargo.lock
+
+# Editor and IDE files
+*.swp
+*.swo
+*~
+.vscode/
+.idea/
+*.iml
+.zed/
+
+# OS-generated files
+.DS_Store
+Thumbs.db
+Desktop.ini
+
+# Rust-specific
+**/*.rs.bk
+
+# Profiling and coverage
+*.profraw
+*.profdata
+lcov.info
+tarpaulin-report.html
+coverage/
+
+# Benchmarking output
+criterion/
+
+# Fuzz corpus and artifacts
+fuzz/corpus/
+fuzz/artifacts/
+
+# Debug and log files
+*.log
+
+# Snapshot testing review artifacts
+*.snap.new
+
+# Claude Code / AI agent ephemeral files
+.claude/
